description: The SelectContent component's Viewport element has the CSS classes max-h-60 and overflow-y-auto applied in packages/ui/primitives/select.tsx.
steps: Click the button with title 'Settings' (settings trigger button)
Wait for the heading 'Document Settings' to appear in the dialog
Click the 'Date Format' select dropdown to open it
Inspect the dropdown viewport element (the element with role 'listbox' or the SelectPrimitive.Viewport wrapper) and verify it has CSS classes 'max-h-60' and 'overflow-y-auto' applied
Take screenshot showing the open dropdown with the constrained viewport
